titleStmt.title: SII 37.238: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 238. (A.R. No. B 344 of 1940-41.) Chinnapasupula, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab near the well in survey No. 204.
This is dated in the cyclic year Plava, Phalguna.

It registers a gift of land as masīdu-mānya by the Dēsāyi, Reḍḍi and Karṇam of Mēḍidinne to Nayanasūku Pullasāni-va-husēnu. The gift is said to have been made at the command of Khānu-Sāhebu. In late characters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayā
Agunēṭi plavanāma saṁvatsara phālguṇa ba pullasā
nivahuśēnu gāriki mēḍidinne dēśāyi reḍḍikaraṇālu vrā
śi yiccina masīdu mānya dānapatraṁ . cina pasupulalō
khōdārasūlu nimittaṁ maśīdu kaṭṭiṁcinaṁduku mā
nyamu yiṁmmani khānu sāyabu meharubānu sā
hēbulugāru śalavu yicciri ganuka śalavu prakāra
ṁ mārājīna sthaḷa ni¨rdēśaṁ cēśi yiccina vivaramu
cina pasapulanuṁcci guṁḍlakuṁṭaku poyyē trōva vu
ttaramu maḍikālu paṭṭucēnu 4 ... 0 dīni tū¨rpu
na muḍiyaṁ vāri bāvikiṁda 0 . 0 vubhayaṁ
kolapāṭi yēdumu reṁḍu muṁttalu sthaḷa ni¨rdē
śamu cēsi yistimi ganuka mīputra pautra pā
raṁparyaṁttaṁgā Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu A
nubhaviṁccagalavāru Ani vrāśi yiccina dāna patraṁ .
reḍla saṁmatina karaṇaṁ vōbuḷaya vrāśina dānapatraṁ .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ parada
ttāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁvā yō harēta vasuṁddharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rva¨rṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē klimiḥ . yiṁddu
ku hiṁddulu Ācchēdanacēśirāyanā kāśilō gō
hatya cēśina pāpāna pōduru turakalu Āchēdana cēśi
rāyanāparadārōjukiyyāmattāku javā
budega
Digital edition of SII 37.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
